blockers.title: Pipeline approval can skip the attested-consent invariant
blockers.evidence: Spec requires the panel to show attested consent and never skip the attestation check (specs/admin-panel.spec.md:143-147). The panel wrapper only checks member_lane before approval (convex/admin/pipelineReviews.ts:74-80), and the shared decision logic patches review.state and member.pipeline_state to approved/on without checking consentRecords or attestation evidence (convex/lib/pipelineDecide.ts:42-49). The test fixture even approves a review while inserting no pipeline consent row (tests/convex/adminPanel.test.ts:403-424).
blockers.required_fix: Before approval, enforce in the shared decision path that the member is standard, active, and has a latest true pipeline consent created through an attested path. Show that evidence in the queue and add a regression where a pending review without consent is refused.

blockers.title: Admin guardian resend bypasses the member resend rate limits
blockers.evidence: Spec requires resendGuardianEmailFromPanel to reuse the member resend path's rotation, rate-limit, and audit behavior exactly (specs/admin-panel.spec.md:157-159). prepareGuardianSend only adds guardian1h/guardian24h per-member buckets when viaMemberResend is true (convex/guardians.ts:161-181), but the admin action calls performGuardianSend(..., false) (convex/guardians.ts:403-418). Admin resends therefore skip the per-minor/per-guardian resend throttle and only hit the global bucket.
blockers.required_fix: Have admin resends consume the same target-member resend buckets, or an equivalent stricter admin-target quota, before token rotation/send. Test repeated admin resends are refused and do not rotate the token.

blockers.title: Conflict resolution can mark a row unclaimed while it is still unclaimable
blockers.evidence: Spec says resolveConflictAsClaimed releases the verified row for normal matchClaim (specs/admin-panel.spec.md:115-123). The mutation allows release without a corrected email and explicitly allows collisions with other conflict rows (convex/admin/claims.ts:118-132; tests/convex/adminPanel.test.ts:255-275). But getMyClaimCandidate and matchClaim hold any email with more than one importedMembers row (convex/members.ts:629-633 and 696-720), so the released row can remain blocked or be re-conflicted instead of claimable.
blockers.required_fix: Before setting claim_state to unclaimed, require the target normalized_email to be unique across importedMembers, or add a real archived-conflict state that matchClaim ignores safely. Add a duplicate-email regression for release without a unique corrected email.

blockers.title: Pipeline audit summaries can store raw PII/free text permanently
blockers.evidence: Audit summaries must be PII-free (specs/admin-panel.spec.md:130-132; Stage 0 §8). applyPipelineDecision writes the raw admin reason into after_summary (convex/lib/pipelineDecide.ts:50-56), and the UI accepts arbitrary note text (src/admin/PipelineReviewsQueue.tsx:68-75, 93-100). That can permanently put names, emails, DOBs, or other sensitive notes into the immutable audit log.
blockers.required_fix: Keep the detailed reason on the review row if needed, but make audit summaries structured and PII-free, such as decision plus reason_present=true. Add a test proving raw note text does not appear in auditLog summaries.

blockers.title: Admin audit log view can hide existing panel actions
blockers.evidence: Spec requires a paginated read-only view filtered to source=admin_fallback (specs/admin-panel.spec.md:227-230). listAdminAuditLog paginates all auditLog rows first and filters admin_fallback in memory (convex/admin/audit.ts:36-45). If a page contains only member/system rows, the UI shows 'Nothing recorded yet' and does not expose the next cursor (src/admin/AdminAuditLog.tsx:18-22), so older admin_fallback actions can be invisible.
blockers.required_fix: Add a source/time index and paginate source=admin_fallback directly, or continue scanning pages until admin rows are returned or the log is exhausted. Keep the older-page control available when nextCursor exists.

non_blocking_notes: npx tsc --noEmit passed. npm test -- --run could not start in this read-only review sandbox because Vite tried to write node_modules/.vite-temp and hit EPERM.
No added member-facing em dashes were found in the diff scan; no gold accent usage was found in the admin UI code.

spec_compliance.criterion: 1. Admin identity check server-side on admin queries/mutations
spec_compliance.evidence: Admin queries/mutations call requireSuperAdmin first; action-side guardian resend gates through requireSuperAdminInAction.
Listing and actions exist, but resolveConflictAsClaimed can produce an unclaimed row that matchClaim still cannot claim when duplicate/conflict rows share the email.
Approval path lacks an attested-consent check and the test approves without a consentRecords row.
Read-and-nudge exists with no confirm path, but admin resend skips the same per-member resend throttles used by the member resend path.
Schema exists; visitor submitDataRequest is Turnstile-gated and signed-in submitMyDataRequest uses the session email only.
Queue and approve/reject transition exist for the buildable scope; fulfilExport and executeErasure are absent per the 2026-07-04 deferral recorded in the spec.
All queue actions use ConfirmAction with an explicit second click and inline outcome.
Audit rows are written, but the filtered paginated view can hide admin_fallback rows because filtering happens after pagination.
No added member-facing em dashes found; admin UI uses the existing token set and no gold accents.

spec_compliance.criterion: 10. No bulk export, no enumeration, neutral errors
spec_compliance.evidence: No bulk export action is added and queues are scoped to review-state rows rather than raw member search.
Added tests miss the guardian resend rate-limit bypass and encode the pipeline attestation bypass by approving without a consent row; full test run could not execute in read-only sandbox.
No Contributor, Safeguarding Deputy, certificate, event, broadcast, general member directory, or config editor surface was added.

summary: DO-NOT-SHIP. The slice has real authorization/safeguarding and audit correctness gaps in the pipeline review, guardian resend, claim-conflict release, and audit visibility paths.
